title: callicarpa moana
intro: Callicarpa moana, also known as the purple plumiera or purple fruit callicarpa, is a type of flowering plant in the lamiaceae family, native to the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of callicarpa moana include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Callicarpa moana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Pacific Island medicine.
